title: crantzia strigosa
intro: Crantzia strigosa, also known as the striped crantzia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Capparaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Crantzia strigosa include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water.
